# Changelog

## [0.2.0] - 2026-03-01

Improved styles for various body elements (line/paragraph spacing, code blocks, lists, figures, etc.)

Added more customization options for the cover page.

Added support for lilaq — you can now draw simple plots without leaving the document.

Added fake bold/italic support based on cuti

## [0.1.1] - 2025-12-13

Initial release.
